mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_order (order_no, user_id, building, room, device_type, priority, description, images, status, create_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{building}, #{room}, #{deviceType}, #{priority}, #{description}, #{images}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.name as user_name FROM repair_order o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT o.*, u.name as user_name FROM repair_order o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE repair_order SET status = 3, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_order WHERE status = #{status}
